creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 221887
patch to update the port

- update 1.34 -> 1.35
- Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/SQL-Abstract-More

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
12.2-RELEASE-p2
pkg 1.16.2
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.0
openssl 1.1.1h
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
